parsed_verdict.reasoning: All Stage 1 rules are restated operationally with scope; the two proportionalities are combined into pace = push/heaviness, allowing a third party to compute pace from push and heaviness. No banned tokens appear, no P1–P7 patterns are present, and uncovered matters (rule 5/8 tension, angled pushes, collisions, air as pusher) are explicitly named in the boundary notes.
